ownership.merkin: structure, addressing, envelopes, work promise identity, replay transport
ownership.mu: execution, compilation, policy, config, solve dispatch
ownership.fsm: handle resolution, callback routing, pubsub, status transitions

drift_rule: Changes to the canonical mu contract, solve surface, procsi section layout, genius attestation contract, or triad required wasm ABI exports must update finger.plan.wasm and compatibility mirrors in the same change.
